seoTitle: Mount Keira vs Mount Kembla — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Keira and Mount Kembla. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Keira vs Mount Kembla: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Keira and Mount Kembla.
heading: Mount Keira vs Mount Kembla — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Keira, New South Wales and Mount Kembla, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Keira has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Mount Kembla (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Keira or Mount Kembla safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Keira has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Mount Kembla scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Keira scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Kembla scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Keira or Mount Kembla?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Keira has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
